script:
Scene 1
Visual: High-energy glitch transition with bass drop.
Audio: Stop scrolling. Most AI tools are built on old logic.
Style: cyber fade
Motion: jitter
BPM: 150
Intensity: high
Duration: 3s

Scene 2
Visual: Split screen showing complex code and clean UI.
Audio: We are looking for partners who value structural integrity.
Style: cold memory
Motion: drift
Intensity: low
Duration: 5s

Scene 3
Visual: Golden sunset logo overlay with warm glow.
Audio: Join the Bozitivez movement. Help us scale for global impact.
Motion: zoom in
BPM: 128
Duration: 6s

Scene 4
Visual: Massive neon JOIN NOW button pulsing.
Audio: Click the link in the bio or email us today.
Style: neon pulse
Motion: ease in
Intensity: high
Duration: 4s
